s: In 2018, Gerson Bautista suited up for NYM as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 12.460, WHIP 3.000, SO 3, WAR -0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYM -> SEA).
In 2019, Gerson Bautista suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 11.000, WHIP 2.440, SO 7, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined SEA.
